result.learned:
The existing agentdex-cli repo (clean worktree at origin/main, branch redesign/evolution-market) is far closer to the redesign's target than its "Pokédex battle arena" framing suggests, and it contains one under-used crown jewel. The repo holds 9 packages (README's table says 7 — doc drift; agentdex_arena and adx_showdown were added post-ADR-0010).

REUSE-vs-REPLACE INVENTORY (verdict per package/subsystem, keyed to the new vision):

1. agentdex_engine — EXTEND (the Pareto-engine nucleus). Three Cards are pydantic strict+extra=forbid: TaskCard (BLAKE3-frozen source bundle), ResultCard (pass_rate, cost_dollar|None, cost_token, speed_wall_clock_sec, pareto_position incl. 'excluded-failed', langfuse trace id/url), EvolutionCard, BattleCard (re-simulable inputLog hash, Glicko fields, ±2·RD discipline). The Pareto verdict is computed in packages/agentdex_engine/src/agentdex_engine/evolver/pareto.py over exactly 3 objectives — pass_rate↑, cost_dollar↓, speed_wall_clock_sec↓ — via domination (single non-dominated agent = winner, else no_clear_winner); crashed baselines (cost_dollar=None or failure_trace_path set) are excluded, never 'cheapest'. Crucially this is a ONE-SHOT cross-baseline verdict per expedition; there is NO persistent per-agent Pareto FRONTIER over generations in the engine. Oracle layer (hard regex+tolerance / soft LLM-judge with calibration≥0.7 gate / repair meta-oracle emitting structural seeds / battle) plus modules/arena (hash-chained EventLog with GENESIS+blake2b16 prev digests, Glicko-2 ladder as recomputable derived view, CRN paired_eval with McNemar, power analysis) all carry over.

2. kaos (vendored subtree, 24.6k LOC) — EXTEND, and it is the surprise: kaos/metaharness/ already ships a full meta-harness search loop (search.py implements 'Algorithm 1 from the Meta-Harness paper arXiv:2603.28052': proposer→AST-validate→parallel-evaluate→store→ParetoFrontier), a persistent ParetoFrontier with per-iteration ParetoPoints and to_dict/from_dict serialization (metaharness/pareto.py), a Benchmark ABC (name/objectives/get_search_set/get_test_set/score — benchmarks/base.py) that is exactly the 'ladder adapter' contract the redesign needs, and concrete adapters including benchmarks/arc_agi3.py (ARC-AGI-3, RHAE scoring) and agentic_coding.py. None of this is wired into the agentdex engine today. Caveat: adapter realism unverified (arc_agi3.py imports random — may be simulated).

3. adx_bridges — KEEP/EXTEND. LongRunningCliBridge + BridgeResponse frozen dataclass (text, langfuse_trace_id, cost_usd, tokens), Claude Code bridge with spawn-timeout floors, --dangerously-skip-permissions cold-shot, --output-format json cost parsing, judge retry classifier. This is precisely the 'drive the user's own Claude Code subscription locally' seam the Weco hook needs. Manus/camoufox bridge likely retires.

4. agentdex_cli — REFACTOR. adx shell + sync expedition wrapper + arena TUI/client + battle_harness_adapter.py (BattleHarness genome: harness_id/system_prompt/move_selection_strategy/tool_policy/params — the JSON-serializable fragment bene mutates). CLI shell + local-first posture match the BYO-creds locus; expedition verbs generalize to 'adx measure/frontier'; arena TUI is Showdown-scoped.

5. agentdex_arena — EXTEND SELECTIVELY. One FastAPI app (gateway.py, ~5300 lines, 60+ routes) with generalizing platform primitives: Ed25519 consent tokens with PoP + domain-separated challenges, per-owner membership (anti-pay-to-rank encoded as ABSENCE of @require_membership on /ladder + Q5 property test), badge authority (separate signing key), EventLog + eventsync PG mirror (idempotent log-shipping, WAL append-before-advance), quota keying (battle owner-pooled, others per-agent, rotation-stable), AND — despite ADR-0013 being 'draft' — already-landed account/device-flow code (device_flow.py, account.py, /auth/device/*, /enroll/account, /account/quota, /me/* routes, GA-era /ga /dashboard pages). Battle-specific routes re-scope.

6. adx_showdown — REFACTOR into the ladder-adapter template. sidecar.mjs/Sidecar/SidecarPool are slated for deletion per ADR-0014 D1 but the swap flag (ADX_BATTLE_BACKEND) was NEVER landed — the secondary track didn't execute. evolution.py is the house-lane 5-store evolution loop (git workspace stores, one commit+tag per generation, best_ever rollback, Distiller/Refiner/pure-Python-Verdict isolation, change_manifest predictions, CRN next-window falsification, HARMFUL→auto-rollback). selfplay/ has the poke-env runner, held-out baselines, 5-dim fitness (win_rate, elo, move_legibility, no_forfeit_exploit, turn_efficiency — 2 strength + 3 anti-reward-hack dims), and the e2e_driver DONE_JSON contract.

7. agentdex_observe — KEEP-AS-IS (Langfuse glue, self-host default, graceful no-op degrade); make an optional extra per ADR-0013 D1's dependency-graph split.

8. agentdex_plugin — RETIRE. The Hermes entry-points integration (hermes chat -t agentdex --yolo) served the old orchestration story; Weco→Claude Code replaces it. Dropping it removes the hermes-agent>=0.15.1 pip dep.

9. helios_client — RETIRE (helios never wired; M6+ forever-deferred). Keep only the CheckpointStore Protocol.

10. web/ + site/ — web/ga ('AgentDex · GA self-serve') + web/dashboard ('agentdex.builders dashboard SPA') are raw material for the new site's app shell; web/arena2d ('watch it think' battle viewer) parks with Showdown; site/ is the BENE marketing site (different product, co-located). The agent-evolution.com-style knowledge taxonomy is NET-NEW — nothing in-tree.

ADR-0014's BENE-gated loop (draft, Phase-1 substrate validated locally: MaxBasePower beat Random 10/10 proving the decision seam) is the direct prior art for the Weco loop: codex proposes mutations through agentdex-cli CLI/MCP verbs, BENE promotes only on a hash-locked win-rate Probe (win_rate >= incumbent + delta) with finish_success hard-gated on BENE ACCEPT never self-assessment, plus the load-bearing CRN invariant (the frozen control must freeze EVERY store the policy reads — team AND system_prompt). Swap 'codex proposes' for 'Weco proposes' and the gate/receipt machinery is reusable as-is. Zero Weco integration code exists anywhere in the product packages (only the docs seed under .fleet-goal/evidence/baseline/weco_docs/).

ADR-0012's battle_id partition model (battle = unit of state+computation+consistency, share-nothing, single-writer, ladder = derived CQRS view, recovery via (seed, inputLog)) generalizes to run_id — but the redesign INVERTS the execution locus (user's machine, BYO creds), so the server keeps only the ledger/leaderboard half; the arena's grounding clause A2 (re-simulable inputLog or the ladder rejects the event) does not transfer cheaply to LLM-dependent user-local runs — the biggest unsolved trust problem.

Board: sweeps/adx-cli-fleet-kanban.json has 89 cards total; the GA-era set is 12 GA-* cards: 7 blocked (GA-BENE-1/2/4, GA-ENROLL, GA-ARENA-MODES, GA-SELFPLAY-EVOLVE, GA-PAID-STRIPE — matching GOALS.md's '7 blocked adx-core GA tasks'), 2 in review (GA-AUTH, GA-DEPLOY), GA-DESIGN done, GA-PR-REVIEW archived; last commit d39cbdc5 reassigned GA-BENE-1/2/4→adx-core and GA-SELFPLAY-EVOLVE→harness.

evidence.note: Pareto verdict dimensions and location: OBJECTIVES = {pass_rate: maximize, cost_dollar: minimize, speed_wall_clock_sec: minimize}; winner/no_clear_winner via domination; failed baselines (cost_dollar=None or failure_trace_path) excluded from the pool. One-shot per expedition — no frontier persistence.

Evolution Card mutation-seed model: Seed{kind, description, evidence_jsonl_excerpt, confidence low|med|high, seed_provenance structural|learned}; mutation_seeds keyed by SeedCategory ∈ {source, reasoning, coding, control, harness}; parent_lineage_root chains lineage; langfuse_trace_urls per agent.

Vendored KAOS ships a full meta-harness search (Algorithm 1, arXiv:2603.28052), a serializable ParetoFrontier with per-iteration points, a Benchmark ABC (objectives/get_search_set/get_test_set/score) = the ladder-adapter contract, and an ARC-AGI-3 adapter (RHAE scoring) — unused by the agentdex engine.

ADR-0014 BENE-gated loop: replace RL with meta-harness evolution; codex proposes via agentdex-cli CLI/MCP; BENE win-rate Probe with hash-locked kill gate (win_rate >= incumbent + delta); finish_success hard-gated on BENE ACCEPT; CRN control must freeze every store the policy reads (team + system_prompt).

battle_id partition model: battle = coinciding unit of state/computation/consistency → share-nothing, single-writer per battle; SidecarPool routing; ladder = incremental cached derived view (CQRS); recovery via (seed, inputLog) WAL replay; cross-partition work (ratings, matchmaking) off the hot path.

evidence.cite: grep -rn 'ADX_BATTLE_BACKEND' packages/ → no matches; grep -ri weco (py/md, non-vendor) → only .fleet-goal/evidence/baseline/weco_docs/*
evidence.note: ADR-0014's secondary track (gateway substrate swap behind ADX_BATTLE_BACKEND=pokeenv|sidecar) never landed — sidecar is still the public-arena substrate; and zero Weco integration code exists in product packages.

Second Pareto vector for the battle lane: multi_dim_fitness = {win_rate, elo, move_legibility, no_forfeit_exploit, turn_efficiency} — 2 strength + 3 anti-reward-hack dims; frozen cross-lane contracts (BattleHarness genome / battle runner / fitness / evolve_battle_harness / codex adapter).

GA-era cards: GA-DESIGN done, GA-AUTH review, GA-DEPLOY review, GA-PR-REVIEW archived, and 7 blocked: GA-ENROLL, GA-ARENA-MODES, GA-SELFPLAY-EVOLVE, GA-PAID-STRIPE, GA-BENE-1/2/4 — matching GOALS.md's '7 blocked adx-core GA tasks' to re-scope.

Arena FastAPI surface: free routes (/ladder /replay /battle/* /enrollment /methodology /skill.md /whoami), gated paid routes (/badge/mint), admin (/admin/grant-membership), and already-landed ADR-0013 account layer (/auth/device/start|poll, /enroll/account, /account/quota, /me/*) plus GA-era pages (/ga, /dashboard, /login, /billing) despite ADR-0013 carrying 'draft' status.

Artifact shapes on disk: task_card (source_bundle_hash BLAKE3, budget caps), pareto_verdict (winner: null, verdict_kind: no_clear_winner, per-agent per-objective integer rankings), evolution_card (mutation_seeds by category with seed_provenance: structural, evidence_jsonl_excerpt).

Anti-pay-to-rank as code invariant (no @require_membership on /ladder; Q5 property test: equal rating-ceiling for free/paid pairs), owner-keyed membership surviving token rotation, scope-conditional quota keying (battle owner-pooled, others per-agent) — the trust discipline the ladder-market site inherits.

House-lane evolution loop: 5 git-workspace stores, one commit+tag per generation, best_ever rollback target, Distiller/Refiner/pure-Python Verdict role isolation, change_manifest predictions before next window, HARMFUL → automatic rollback — reusable receipt/honesty machinery for the Weco loop.

next: Design synthesis should name kaos/metaharness/benchmarks/base.py Benchmark ABC as the starting ladder-adapter contract and reconcile it with adx_showdown/selfplay's fitness/baselines pattern (two adapter idioms in-tree; pick one).

Verify whether kaos.metaharness benchmark adapters (arc_agi3.py, agentic_coding.py) run against real benchmark APIs or synthetic/simulated problems before counting them as working run-adapters (arc_agi3.py imports random — suspect simulation).

Resolve the three-way meta-harness overlap: kaos.metaharness (vendored, frontier+search), bene-main mh_* (external, kill-gates), and Weco (no code in-tree) — decide which owns proposal, which owns gating, which owns the frontier store; ADR-0015 must state this explicitly.
Verify the Weco→Claude Code drive mechanism from primary sources (weco CLI / aideml) — GOALS.md flags it must-verify; nothing in-tree answers it.

Confirm actual E2E status of the selfplay-metaharness SPEC: header says EVIDENCE COMPLETE but acceptance boxes 1 (codex-over-MCP) and 3 (+10pp held-out) are unchecked in the doc; check tasks/selfplay-metaharness/artifacts/*.json.

Design the trust model for user-local run results (the A2 grounding clause does not transfer to BYO-compute LLM runs) — signed result cards + trace hashes + spot re-run audits are the open design space.
Re-scope the 7 blocked GA cards against the new architecture once ADR-0015 drafts (GA-AUTH/GA-DEPLOY in review are still-needed substrate per GOALS req 1).
key_facts: Pareto verdict lives in packages/agentdex_engine/src/agentdex_engine/evolver/pareto.py with exactly 3 objectives: pass_rate↑, cost_dollar↓, speed_wall_clock_sec↓; it is a one-shot cross-baseline verdict per expedition, not a frontier; failed baselines are excluded ('excluded-failed' ParetoPosition).

A second Pareto vector exists for the battle lane: 5-dim multi_dim_fitness {win_rate, elo, move_legibility, no_forfeit_exploit, turn_efficiency} in adx_showdown/selfplay/fitness.py (2 strength + 3 anti-reward-hack dims).

The vendored KAOS subtree ships an unused meta-harness search with a persistent, serializable ParetoFrontier over iterations plus a Benchmark ABC and an ARC-AGI-3 adapter (kaos/metaharness/), citing arXiv:2603.28052.

EvolutionCard Seed model: {kind, description, evidence_jsonl_excerpt, confidence, seed_provenance ∈ structural|learned}, categories {source, reasoning, coding, control, harness}; M5 gate accepts structural seeds, M7 target ≥1 learned; learned_seeds.py is a deterministic placeholder, not ML.

ADR-0014 (draft): poke-env replaces the sidecar; codex proposes mutations via agentdex-cli CLI/MCP; BENE promotes via hash-locked win-rate Probe (win_rate >= incumbent + delta); finish_success hard-gated on BENE ACCEPT; CRN control window must freeze every store the policy reads. Phase-1 substrate validated locally; the gateway substrate swap (ADX_BATTLE_BACKEND flag) never landed.

ADR-0012: battle_id is the partition key (share-nothing, single-writer per battle); EventLog is source of truth with WAL append-before-advance; ladder is a byte-identically recomputable derived view; recovery via (seed, inputLog).
ADR-0011: anti-pay-to-rank is a code invariant (no @require_membership on /ladder, Q5 property test, symmetric battle quota, owner-keyed membership surviving 7-day token rotation).
Zero Weco integration code exists in product packages — only the docs seed at .fleet-goal/evidence/baseline/weco_docs/.
The repo has 9 packages, not the 7 the README table lists (agentdex_arena and adx_showdown are undocumented there).
The kanban board holds 89 cards; the GA-era set is 12 GA-* cards with 7 blocked (GA-BENE-1/2/4, GA-ENROLL, GA-ARENA-MODES, GA-SELFPLAY-EVOLVE, GA-PAID-STRIPE) and GA-AUTH/GA-DEPLOY in review.
ADR-0013's account layer is substantially LANDED in code (device_flow.py, account.py, /auth/device/*, /enroll/account, /account/quota, /me/*) despite the ADR carrying draft status.
adx_bridges' BridgeResponse (text, langfuse_trace_id, cost_usd, tokens) from a locally-spawned Claude Code CLI is the existing seam for driving the user's own subscription locally.
design_implications: Inherited for free: typed card schemas (Task/Result/Evolution/Battle, pydantic strict), the Pareto domination primitive, the hash-chained EventLog + byte-identical ladder recompute (the 'coordinator + ledger + leaderboard' server role in GOALS req 4), Ed25519 consent + anti-pay-to-rank discipline for the market site, local Claude Code bridges with cost/token capture, Glicko + CRN/McNemar delta instruments, and a device-flow account layer already in the gateway.

The single biggest structural delta is verdict→frontier: the engine computes a one-shot cross-baseline ParetoVerdict, while the redesign needs a persistent per-agent Pareto frontier across self-evolution generations. The missing piece already exists in-tree as kaos/metaharness/pareto.py's ParetoFrontier — wire it into agentdex_engine rather than building new; consolidate the three Pareto implementations (evolver/pareto.py, selfplay/fitness.py vector, kaos ParetoFrontier) around one domination primitive.

The improvement loop is a role swap, not a rebuild: ADR-0014's proven shape (proposer mutates → measured on held-out baselines → hash-locked kill gate promotes → lineage receipt) keeps BENE-style gating and EvolutionCard receipts and substitutes Weco for codex as the proposer; mutation seeds (seed_provenance-typed) become the interchange format agentdex hands to Weco as optimization hints.

Ladder adapters have a ready contract: kaos Benchmark ABC (objectives + search/test split + score) merged with adx_showdown/selfplay's held-out-baseline + anti-reward-hack fitness pattern. Per GOALS req 3, curate all six ladders as metadata; build 2-3 run-adapters on this contract (an ARC-AGI-3 adapter skeleton already exists in kaos).

Execution-locus inversion is the hardest inherited-invariant break: the arena's grounding clause A2 (server rejects rating events without re-simulable inputLog) cannot be enforced for LLM-dependent runs on user machines. The redesign must design a new trust tier (signed ResultCards + trace hashes + audit re-runs) or accept honest 'self-reported' labeling — deterministic-replay verification only works for the Showdown-style substrates.

Retire list is cheap and clarifying: agentdex_plugin (drops the hermes-agent pip dep), helios_client (keep CheckpointStore Protocol), Manus/camoufox bridge, sidecar/SidecarPool (per ADR-0014 D1, finishing what the un-landed secondary track started), web/arena2d (parks with Showdown).

The website inherits an app shell (web/ga + web/dashboard SPA targeting agentdex.builders) and the paid-surface/market discipline from ADR-0011, but the agent-evolution.com-style knowledge taxonomy is entirely net-new content work with no in-tree counterpart.

Re-scoping the 7 blocked GA cards maps naturally: GA-AUTH/GA-DEPLOY (review) remain substrate for any web product; GA-ENROLL's agent_source allowlist becomes the enrollment floor for self-evolving agents; GA-SELFPLAY-EVOLVE's recon comment already describes the loop the redesign generalizes; GA-PAID-STRIPE stays deferred per GOALS non-goals.
open_questions: Are kaos.metaharness benchmark adapters (arc_agi3.py, agentic_coding.py, math_rag.py) real API/dataset integrations or synthetic simulations? (arc_agi3.py imports random; not verified end-to-end — and a prior memory note flags a stale-tree synthetic-13 fallback trap in this area.)

Which meta-harness substrate does the redesign standardize on: vendored kaos.metaharness, external bene-main mh_* (MetaHarnessSearch + kill gates), or Weco itself? All three overlap on proposer/evaluator/frontier roles.
Exact mechanism by which Weco drives Claude Code locally (weco CLI vs aideml agent) — GOALS.md marks it must-verify from primary sources; nothing in this repo answers it.

True E2E status of the selfplay-metaharness loop: SPEC header says EVIDENCE COMPLETE but acceptance boxes 1 (codex drives via MCP) and 3 (+10pp held-out) are unchecked; artifacts under tasks/selfplay-metaharness/artifacts/ not inspected.

How much KAOS lineage (experiments.log / KaosCheckpointStore) is actually populated in practice — kaos_adapter.py self-describes as 'stub at M2; wires to Kaos(db) at M5+'; whether real expeditions persist lineage was not verified.
Server-side verifiability model for user-local BYO-compute results (A2/A8 do not transfer): what replaces re-simulation as the anti-gaming rail for the public leaderboard?

Whether the 5-dim battle fitness's missing 'cost' dimension (flagged in GA-SELFPLAY-EVOLVE comment: 'cost not in current fitness') should be mandatory in the redesign's frontier axes, given cost_dollar is a first-class expedition objective.
